arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Man Utd decide Casemiro future; Inter & Juventus hunt Van Dijk
arts.sum: Real Madrid ' s pursuit of Bayern Munich full-back Alphonso Davies is 'into the final stretch', with the 23-year-old expected to move to Spain next summer for free. Manchester United and Arsenal target Xavi Simons wants to move to the Premier League after concluding his season-long loan spell at RB Leipzig.

arts.ttl: Donny van de Beek 'trying to enjoy himself again' after Man Utd troubles
arts.sum: Donny van de Beek says he's trying to enjoy playing football once again after ending a difficult four-year spell at Manchester United this summer. Speaking to ESPN Netherlands, the central midfielder admits he's simply trying to enjoy football again, yet he doesn't have a bad word to say about his time in England.

arts.ttl: Man Utd star Rashford proves haters wrong AGAIN
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford has proven that he is more than capable as Manchester United's leading man once again. Man Utd star Rashford proves haters wrong AGAIN

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag rant works to perfection after calling out Man Utd duo vs Southampton
arts.sum: Manchester United struggled to convince during the opening 45 minutes against newly-promoted Southampton at St Mary’s on Saturday with two players getting words from the Red Devils boss

arts.ttl: Alejandro Garnacho 'was NOT dropped for Man United's trip to Southampton because he liked Instagram post referencing Cristiano Ronaldo's criticism of Erik ten Hag'
arts.sum: The 20-year-old was dropped to the bench by Erik ten Hag, with Amad Diallo taking his place on the right wing just days after liking a post detailing Ronaldo's criticism of the Dutchman.

arts.ttl: Man Utd make two exciting transfers official as wait for Arsenal deal continues
arts.sum: Manchester United are continuing to welcome new players under their INEOS regime, despite the summer transfer window coming to a close more than a fortnight ago

arts.ttl: Why Alejandro Garnacho has been dropped by Manchester United manager Erik ten Hag
arts.sum: Alejandro Garnacho made his first start of the season against Liverpool but is back on the bench at Southampton.

arts.ttl: Why Manuel Ugarte doesn't start for Manchester United vs Southampton
arts.sum: Man Utd take on Southampton today and Erik ten Hag has explained his starting team.

arts.ttl: Alejandro Garnacho DROPPED by Erik ten Hag after liking post slamming Man Utd boss
arts.sum: Alejandro Garnacho has been named on the bench for Manchester United's Premier League clash with Southampton, having liked an Instagram post this week which contained criticism of manager Erik ten Hag

arts.ttl: Soton v Man Utd team news: Harwood-Bellis + Armstrong benched
